name: One-on-One
description: Manager/report 1:1: discussion topics, feedback, growth, follow-ups.

sections.title: Topics Discussed
sections.instruction: The main things talked about, as short bullets.

sections.title: Feedback
sections.instruction: Feedback given or received in either direction; write 'None' if there was none.

sections.title: Growth & Development
sections.instruction: Career, skills, or growth topics raised; write 'None' if there were none.

sections.title: Follow-ups
sections.instruction: Things to revisit at the next 1:1, as short bullets.
